creator: mb@lunetics.com
text:
With a fresh install, the default home of the "git" (gitosis) user is /usr/local/git . With that directory it's impossible to get ssh pulls / pushes with keys (added by gitlab UI in /home/git/.ssh/authorized_keys) working.

This actually helped:

http://serverfault.com/questions/567340/gitlab-not-working-with-ssh-keys/805636#805636
